textByHash.04cf63f0e3003b84c317ef1063e2b3550b50625d: Not many people want to visit this part of the world so I have to keep the price high. If I didn't I wouldn't be able to keep my boat maintained.
textByHash.11d338b24125724c05930627fb2a7d251faadc92: Hello there. Want to travel to Slepe?
textByHash.2b524a9c868e1eafb3706886c8da903935841b81: Hello there. Want to return to Port Phasmatys?
textByHash.9a895bef9f0f33e3af15c10877bb30c988ae68de: Oh, I see. So, do you want to go to Slepe?
textByHash.9e80bee114291abaf343d801b198f2a5f4cac269: It's a large vampyric castle, home to the Theatre of Blood. The vampyres claim that the Theatre is one of the greatest combat challenges around. Definitely worth a look even if you don't want to participate.
textByHash.aeeb51a85d5f78da849a5a7b01f8222f79dce321: Anyway, did you want to return to Port Phasmatys?
textByHash.b04948efd2e16b63085471c348338c23c8bed0f7: Thank you so much. Now, do you want to go to Slepe?
textByHash.c894f0f62fb4284385eea31392d59ca58a1fbae4: There's also Ver Sinhaza. You can find it south of here. There's a gap in the northern wall that you can get through.
textByHash.ca8c4749c7e22e65d57369fa73b02dfdf96cacc3: Hello there. Want to travel to Slepe? I charge 10,000 coins for the journey.
textByHash.d24c1b88ff12f0a953a315bbe2834259afe8469b: I guess that depends what interests you. The place is pretty quiet, though there's been rumours recently of a great evil making its home beneath the village.
textByHash.e0048648bfea0bbf2ec7d9895d312143cf283f01: There's also Ver Sinhaza to the south, home to the Theatre of Blood. It's definitely worth having a look around, even if you don't intend to participate yourself.
textByHash.e0fa7474612991b879f29a5e1112861b15287fbd: It's a small village to the south of here. You can walk but the boat is safer and faster.
textByHash.ead0421994d661fff59eba6e25643d695749a44a: Doesn't look like you have enough money. I charge 10,000 coins for the journey.
textByHash.f81792677b803bc0dadccdbea59328e2f76f9675: So, do you want to go to Slepe?
textByHash.fce6f7f01cd11c7098b7c89606108d6ea17762d4: Well you have Slepe just north of here. It's mostly a quiet place, though there's been rumours recently of a great evil making its home beneath the village.
